message:
fix: doctor agent-beads-exist check now finds wisps (#1935)

ListAgentBeadsFromWisps() was silently broken — JSON parsing expected
[]*Issue but bd mol wisp list --json returns {"wisps": [...]}, so
unmarshal always failed. Even with correct parsing, wisp JSON omits
issue_type/labels, so IsAgentBead() always returned false.

Fixes: JSON wrapper parsing, adds isAgentBeadByID() fallback by naming
convention, adds wisps table fallback to both Run and Fix methods of
agent-beads-exist check, adds unregistered-beads-dirs doctor check,
and hardens misclassified_wisp_check for deleted/migrated issues.

Note: PR #1935 removed --ephemeral from CreateAgentBead; that removal
is reverted here — agent beads should remain wisps per gt-bewatn.9.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -226,6 +226,7 @@ func runDoctor(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
 	d.Register(doctor.NewDoltMetadataCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewDoltServerReachableCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewDoltOrphanedDatabaseCheck())
+	d.Register(doctor.NewUnregisteredBeadsDirsCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewNullAssigneeCheck())
 
 	// Worktree gitdir validity (runs across all rigs, or specific rig with --rig)
